vulnerabilities.description: Potential for sensitive information leakage due to lack of error handling during task fetching and notification logging.
vulnerabilities.fix_suggestion: Implement more robust error handling that does not expose sensitive system information in logs. Use generic error messages when logging errors.

vulnerabilities.description: No validation or sanitization is enforced on task inputs (e.g., title, description, recurrence).
vulnerabilities.fix_suggestion: Add validation functions to sanitize and validate input parameters when creating or updating tasks.
